name: wauth-digital-credentials
description: Govern AI-agent wallet-credential presentment through the WAUTH Digital-Credentials doorkeeper — the agent presents a digital credential (Apple Wallet / Digital Credentials API / mdoc / EUDI) bound via HAPP; the doorkeeper verifies the presentation (issuer-signed, holder-bound, aud/nonce-bound, unexpired) and issues scoped authority. Reading accepted types is free; a standard credential needs a passkey; a high-assurance identity / age / KYC / government-ID presentation — or a failed holder binding — needs passkey + iProov liveness. The agent never holds the raw credential.
